form.layout: ==========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== orgId[业务组织] materialId[物料] skuId[SKU] warehouseId[仓库] locationId[库位] batchNo[批号] ==========>quantity[数量信息]====== totalQuantity[总数量] reservedQuantity[预留数量] lockedQuantity[冻结数量] availableQuantity[可用数量] ==========>cost[成本信息]====== costMethod[计价方法] avgCost[平均成本] totalCost[总成本] currencyId[币种] ==========>ownership[所有权]====== ownerId[所有权往来单位] ownershipType[所有权类型]

==========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== orgId[业务组织] materialId[物料] skuId[SKU] warehouseId[仓库] locationId[库位] batchNo[批号] ==========>quantity[数量信息]====== totalQuantity[总数量] reservedQuantity[预留数量] lockedQuantity[冻结数量] availableQuantity[可用数量] ==========>cost[成本信息]====== costMethod[计价方法] avgCost[平均成本] totalCost[总成本] currencyId[币种] ==========>ownership[所有权]====== ownerId[所有权往来单位] ownershipType[所有权类型]

form.title: 查询条件
form.layout: materialId[物料] warehouseId[仓库] batchNo[批号] orgId[业务组织]
